author: @calebomoro8227
comment_text: U are bad at stealth... U see those arrows that changes colour they are called line of sight most stealth games uses it. It can change from white to yellow then red... The time interval between them is what you should be taking advantage of for instance if you want to run to another cover and it is in the line of sight of the enemy u can run to it even if the arrow shows he is seeing you as long it hasn't turned yellow continue running to the next cover.... If it turns yellow hide immediately cause the guard will suspect something and check the perimeter you can avoid it by hiding in a new location and STAY PUT (cause I have noticed u don't know how to stay put if crouching for minutes let you understand the guards pattern or observe the area DO IT don't stand at every interval and panic) if they is no new location to hide... Hide in the same location he saw you but position yourself towards him ( in a slant manner is best if you want to go around him) when he comes close the game will show a prompt to assassinate him use that prompt don't charge at him like an idiot you are JAMES BOND not Rambo.... If the line of sight turns red it means they have lock on to you... The first thing you should do is run to an isolated location naturally the enemy will follow you then take him out in that isolated location if you are fast enough and position yourself properly you can assassinate him but if he is the type of enemy that calls for reinforcement or the mission says don't ring the alarm in most games even if they see you u have some seconds to take him out before he rings the Alarm.... HOPE YOU GET TO SEE THIS COMMENT

comment_text: U are bad at stealth... U see those arrows that changes colour they are called line of sight most stealth games uses it. It can change from white to yellow then red... The time interval between them is what you should be taking advantage of for instance if you want to run to another cover and it is in the line of sight of the enemy u can run to it even if the arrow shows he is seeing you as long it hasn't turned yellow continue running to the next cover.... If it turns yellow hide immediately cause the guard will suspect something and check the perimeter you can avoid it by hiding in a new location and STAY PUT (cause I have noticed u don't know how to stay put if crouching for minutes let you understand the guards pattern or observe the area DO IT don't stand at every interval and panic) if they is no new location to hide... Hide in the same location he saw you but position yourself towards him ( in a slant manner is best if you want to go around him) when he comes close the game will show a prompt to assassinate him use that prompt don't charge at him like an idiot you are JAMES BOND not Rambo.... If the line of sight turns red it means they have lock on to you... The first thing you should do is run to an isolated location naturally the enemy will follow you then take him out in that isolated location if you are fast enough and position yourself properly you can assassinate him but if he is the type of enemy that calls for reinforcement or the mission says don't ring the alarm in most games even if they see you u have some seconds to take him out before he rings the Alarm.... author: @JacintoBpc12
comment_text: For me, playing FIFA or FC, is all about fun. I've been playing Football games since like 99' or 2000. When my father bought me a football game for my PS1. I'm competitive but not to the point of using meta or abusing mechanics. I left FIFA/FC this year cause people played similar every game and had the same players evoed or normal. I'm the type to buy a player like Fábio Silva, Luna or even a player that has a facescan but not used by the community. I left the game on Div 1, 13 wins every week WL and had the most mid team ever on the eyes of people, still got wins, good rewards but never used meta. EA need to realize that for some of us is not about a Pelé, R9 or fkn tokens. Its about login in, enter a match, play good football, no lags, no bs and exploits, just a regular game where the person who plays good football wins.

author: @GutierriSS
comment_text: I see everywhere people complaining about menus, stop the cope about having a menu grind. Yeah it's really bad atm but it doesnt make a difference to have a menu grind if the gameplay sucks. Whats the point of packing 200+ special cards? You are gonna use 10-15% of them at most and the gameplay sucks, is not even funny with the best cards in the game. Is just team press, control only one player, spam bruiser, counter trought ball simulator.. you can win with just that. You can try to play different but you are gonna be in huge disadventage. Yeah, I know a new patch is coming with some nerfs and buffs or w/e, but the game is gone, it's not gonna change attack AI, bounce backs, etc etc. Tbh, the nerf to bruiser cancelling the animation is dumb, it shouldnt be cancel. What should happen is you getting more fouls when you are run from behind and shoved out of the pitch, receive more yellow cards in this situations. Another thing, the fact that you can foul a player inside the box being the last man in a goal scoring opportunity and only getting a yellow is baffling to me. Anyways, we can rant all day about everything wrong in this game, there's some much more..

What should happen is you getting more fouls when you are run from behind and shoved out of the pitch, receive more yellow cards in this situations. Another thing, the fact that you can foul a player inside the box being the last man in a goal scoring opportunity and only getting a yellow is baffling to me. Anyways, we can rant all day about everything wrong in this game, there's some much more..

author: @Taubenstampfer
comment_text: yeah, fk u ea for not let us play with all the nations in a regular career mode. never quitted a fifa/ea game faster than this one and i play since the first game 94 (with a longer break about 2004-2012). ultimate team is just a joke and career mode is getting worse every year. same bugs for about 3-5 years. mods for pc have to fix your stupid market values. imo the problem is that fc has just no soul anymore. efootball for me as a pes veteran isnt an option too because i like to play offline modes and yeah... sad years for football fans like us.

author: @gustmoonsociety
comment_text: I personally don't mind this FC that much, besides that they killed the market and they made a few things too meta. I know it's an unpopular opinion but I've never gotten more wins in weekend league, never felt like my defending actually mattered this much and never felt the skillgap being this decent. The game has many flaws, like every year, but I don't see how the game is supposedly 'dead'. I'm playing with a creative ronaldo evo, messi evo, jordi alba evo and simikan evo that are all higher meta rating than the promo cards. Isn't the point of these games that u CAN use anyone and make them meta? I kinda like that, might be an L take tho :)

comment_text:
I’m still playing FC but I started during TOTY and haven’t played since FIFA 22. The game is honestly a rage bait simulator. It’s very much “your turn, my turn” gameplay. And they players move like bots, not like they’re playing football.

I stay because I love football and I enjoy getting better but Nick is absolutely right. I’m a div 3/div 2 player and max 10 wins in champs but there isn’t much value in the time devoted unfortunately.

I’ll likely just play draft until they shut down the 26 servers because building a team feels like being a football manager. The updates don’t change the fact that the game is gone. The people have woken up and won’t be finessed as easily.

comment_text:
He wasn't lucky.
1) His player easily intercepted your passes because he probably plays quick counter and in quick counters players are really close to each other, he also could press because of a highline.
2) Lbc has a problem and its that you can rarely find passing options and since the players are wide apart, opponent can just go through you.
3) Lbc has a low back line so you can't really drag players from the back because the distance between your defender and their attackers are far apart, by the time your players reach oppo attackers he is gonna pass to another player and voila because you have a hole in the defense line they score,  for pressure high defense line playstyles work like possession and quick counter



Just switch to QC pick

author: @nacerrrr5615
comment_text:
yo Nick, here are the setting and what they do in-game:
ABS - brakes don't lock instantly - keep on
traction control - the wheels don't lose traction BUT the car gets weaker because it kills the brute power of the engine - keep on in the beginning but try playing with it off on offline races to learn how to control the car without it.
stability control - automatically applies braking to prevent the car from slipping out, also kills your speed - keep off if possible, just remember to brake before the corners and you r good
launch control - helps launching the car - ok to keep on
steering - standard helps when using a controles, keep it on standard
cleaned_text: yo Nick, here are the setting and what they do in-game: ABS - brakes don't lock instantly - keep on traction control - the wheels don't lose traction BUT the car gets weaker because it kills the brute power of the engine - keep on in the beginning but try playing with it off on offline races to learn how to control the car without it. stability control - automatically applies braking to prevent the car from slipping out, also kills your speed - keep off if possible, just remember to brake before the corners and you r good launch control - helps launching the car - ok to keep on steering - standard helps when using a controles, keep it on standard

author: @RichardAllsopp-n7g
comment_text: These smart assist users in eFootball are in denial. You can tell straight away when someone is using it, they usually have a terrible team, but their players have 99 aggression while they're playing possession or long ball counter. You'll struggle on wondering whether you're going mad, then the inevitable auto clearance or shot adjustment comes and it's confirmed. We see you. Good luck in few weeks when your poor manual abilities are exposed and you can't win games because your rank has been inflated by AI :)

author: @Nev98989
comment_text: You should try 4-2-2-2 formation, keep back line the same but have two dmfs (anchorman and orchestrator, can switch the orch to cmf if you want to be more aggressive), two amfs (at least one should be a hole player), and two CFs (can be goal poacher and any other style but at least one poacher). Jeansui uses it and it’s very effective. Might be better with two defensive fullbacks though

author: @bemowen
comment_text:
Efootball is genuinely so many levels above fc like smart assist is my only complaint and they are working on it in the higher divisions. Attacking AI is A++ if you mess a play up it feels like you can only blame yourself and playing good opponents feels great!

It’s not even that pay to win if we are being real if you compare what you could spend to fc it blows it out of the water with the limited draws, if you want someone’s specific you can get there. Top tier fc players? Prepare to call your bank and let them know a new mbappe is out.

Saying that efootball is far far far better than Fifa, fifa is genuinely trash these days.

author: @TestProgram-NaNasemJeziku
comment_text:
Yes, yes, but eFootball needs to be better for F2P players who invest a lot of time into the game. It should work like this: more time invested = less money needed. Players who play every day should be able to get the same players as someone who barely plays but spends €15–20 per week. You know what I mean?

Right now, if you don’t spend €10–20 from time to time, you can’t really compete against teams full of paid players.

author: @NEOPHRON_10
comment_text:
I am so happy that efootball is getting more views than fc nowadays. I love watching efootball content bcz I see people playing the game , not just opening pack and ending the video . The gameplay in efootball is so much more diverse than fc . They have so many playstyle , and I come across so many people who play so differently . I know the meta is lbc and quick counter , but still you can see other playstyle too like possession and out wide . And the playstyle actually affects how your player moves , also the different types of ways you can level your player

The only thing ruining this game for me is it's UI and SMART ASSIST. Also I think they should shift to unreal engine 5 ,, bcz the graphics aren't that good

author: @ondrej1893
comment_text: Efootball is miles ahead in gameplay but sadly Konami caters to casuals and bring stuff nobody asked for like Smart Assist. Filter is coming though. Even without SA there are now too many handholding assistants in the game, like pass assist level 1. Otherwise they also put in more ShowTime skills tkat kinda break the simulation game - like Blitz Curl, Long Reach Tackle…At least they balance it over time to be less spammable. Honestly all this is fine. If they implement proper Smart Assist filter, then the main problem will be connection/servers, as that is most often the thing that breaks your play. This game would really benefit from smoothness of let’s say Fornite. Where you never even see lag or think about connection. If you have connection, you can tiki-taka anyone. If you don’t, “meta” long ball counter 5 at the back team who spam “Capello-ball” will likely beat you. Those games often feel kept tightly in the automated corridor. Smart Assist, auto-clearance, auto-linkup play long ball etc. They abuse big player models like Vieira, Gullit to power through in the game.

Smart Assist, auto-clearance, auto-linkup play long ball etc. They abuse big player models like Vieira, Gullit to power through in the game.
cleaned_text: Efootball is miles ahead in gameplay but sadly Konami caters to casuals and bring stuff nobody asked for like Smart Assist. Filter is coming though. Even without SA there are now too many handholding assistants in the game, like pass assist level 1. Otherwise they also put in more ShowTime skills tkat kinda break the simulation game - like Blitz Curl, Long Reach Tackle…At least they balance it over time to be less spammable. Honestly all this is fine. If they implement proper Smart Assist filter, then the main problem will be connection/servers, as that is most often the thing that breaks your play. author: @Michael-qg2rx
comment_text: As f2p, when I started this game that Kane was my best striker. I didn't know anything about playstyles back then and I think he's a deep lying forward. Till today I haven't used a striker with better linkup play (and I have epics now). Apart from his pace, he can shoot, is decent in the air, can make ground and lofted through passes, is physically strong and even back then before they buffed long range shooting, if he's on A form his shots are deadly from outside the box against epic GK's..

comment_text: 22:53 Pick phenomenal finishing just boosts a player's finishing ability when shooting from a weird position/angle. For example, if Eto'o had the ball and his back is towards the goal, you could shoot and it would have a higher chance of going in vs without phenomenal finishing. It goes both ways too, when you're on a breakaway and you shoot facing the goal, phenomenal finishing doesn't activate and boost your shot.

comment_text:
I just learned about him and watched his video. 

Even though he's a beginner, he's already better than "the Noob Nick". 😉


I'm going to watch his channel from now on because he's really mastered using super cancels. 

I think he'll listen to advice and get even better. 

You, on the other hand, are still making excuses and don't accept advice in the comments. 

How long are you going to keep blaming SA when you lose? 😟

You can see from the rankings that there are many people ranked higher than you.

Just accept the advice in the comments. 
There are negative aspects to using SA in the first place. 
For example, you can't choose your shooting course and defenders clear the ball automatically. 
Dribbling isn't free either. 

SA isn't as strong as you think, so stop making excuses like a certain YouTuber from Saudi Arabia.

author: @malimujo4915
comment_text:
How much money do people even spend on these “legendary” players? Jeez…
They keep releasing the same retired players over and over again with even crazier ratings. Now we’ve got Pelé at 107 OVR. In a few years they’ll probably release a 207 OVR Pelé 😝
At this point, half the game is just retired legends turned into superhuman aliens. Honestly, it’s getting ridiculous. The gameplay is becoming so fast and automated that soon we won’t even need to play ourselves.
Sometimes it feels like Konami’s secret plan is to slowly replace human players altogether 😂
Nowadays game developers have quite retarded vision if you ask me.

author: @IhorIvkov
comment_text:
It’s interesting that now you and other streamers are going to blame everything except admitting that you simply played worse than your opponent in a certain match.

Think about it — one way or another, the game already has smart assist built into it. You’re not capable of making perfectly accurate passes and shots without AI assistance. That’s the foundation of games like EFootball. This isn’t Counter-Strike or other shooters where you manually aim and shoot someone in the head.

In EFootball, AI helps you hit the target anyway.

I tested the game both with Smart Assist enabled and disabled. And personally, I think it actually gets in the way more than it helps.

The people you and other streamers were facing with Smart Assist turned on are simply really good at EFootball. That’s why your losses happen… IMO.

author: @robisco777
comment_text: Guy playing as Monaco in that last game 300% was using smart assist. Bar changing color isn't the only indicator, and since it's the most obvious indicator, KONAMI patched how often the color changes so people are less likely to blame smart assist. Guy is sliding unnaturally on defense to get the ball and is connecting some passes he has no business doing so. The ball feels magnetic to their players, and it feels like you've got a repelling magnet, it's the most frustrating thing introduced in any PvP game ever.

author: @Marinho10
comment_text:
My GOAT is back. Hope you are feeling better. I mean you're not a weak kid so of course I'm sure you'll be healthy in no time!
Anyway, SA bad. Filter good. Now they only need to also start toning down AI defending, because it's still crazy to me that an opponent can put the controller down and the AI can still do soo much, especially inside the box.
Edit: As for the divisions. Konami goes from highest division you achieved. So if you reached div 1 you can never go lower than div 3, if your highest division was 2 then you can never go lower than 4, and so on. even if you don't play for one or more new seasons.
Edit 2: That last guy was not using SA. The best way to tell if someone is using SA is to look at the shot and pass bar. If it goes from 0 to, for example, 50% automatically then they are using SA. However if it goes from 0, then to 10, 20, 30, 40, and 50% (basically you see the entire fill animation going from 0 to 50) then SA is off.

author: @Remypalz
comment_text:
The thing is the premise of smart assist in online games in the first place is bullshit like it doesn’t make any logical sense 
If it was only restricted to Ai division games I would understand to some extent, but how can you just put something in online games that basically stunts the progress of your users and make gameplay more frustrating than fun it just doesn’t make any sense to me 
Konami has always been a directionless company but this takes the cake in their levels of stupidity honestly I am struggling to find the reason smart assist was introduced in the first place especially in online games and left for this long despite people hating it from the onset and now their solution to is to divide the fanbase and basically create a class system in the same games which will in turn bring more toxicity and probably damage the reputation of the company all the more 
Just bizarre stuff tbh 
Konami better fix up or when EA finally figures out their shit then they won’t be anywhere near them

comment_text: i don't even play the game, but new games or franchise games tend to make the game "noob" friendly. The new generation of gamers don't want to jump on a game and learn and actually grind to get better. They want to be good the first time they try the game or else they just complain about the difficulty. So this "smart assist" sounds like it is only for players who just wants to be good without being good. I miss the times when games had a big  "Skill Gap".

author: @blackjesus4129
comment_text:
I think @NickRTFM described it perfectly , you feel suffocated you dont have to see someones bar changing colors or auto clearnance  to know he is using smart assist .
If you feel like your opponent is pressing the hell out of you without leaving gaps and space then 99% of the time he is using smart assist . 
Your passes become sluggish and slow and you have to overthink the simpleest passes then your opponent is using smart assist . 
another trick when you finish the game go look at the compare stats if you see over 20 % press compared to matchup ( jockey ) and you have no space then he is 100%  using smart assist .
Because all  these smart assist rats do is press X and their defenders will be on Prime maldini ++ they will anticipate every turn you make every small dribble etc etc .

Because all these smart assist rats do is press X and their defenders will be on Prime maldini ++ they will anticipate every turn you make every small dribble etc etc .

comment_text:
No es por defender a nadie, pero casi no hay diferencia entre la defensa de la smart assist y los que lo llevan apagado. Con respecto a los pases o tiros al arco, muchas veces hace cosas que tu no quieres. Tambien pasa que te llena la barra para hacer super pases fuertes que te hacen perder tiempo y te la terminan quitando, cuando tu solo querias un pase normal y rapido. Tambien pasa que quieres dar un pase filtrado por abajo y la lanza por arriba, arruinandote toda la jugada. 
Una persona que juega bien sin Smart Assist es mejor que una con SmartAssist apagado sin dudas. No se por que se quejan tanto...

author: @Anonymous_web
comment_text: All the videos and social media posts about eFootball criticize assists. Assists (shooting, passing, dribbling, automatic substitution, cursor, attack and defense levels, sub-tactics, offside line) and intelligent assists, automaticity (the ball follows the player, making it impossible to pass directly to the opponent) and assisted gameplay (you press the button and the AI ​​tries to correct the action), all of this interferes with gameplay and you can't know your true level or anyone else's because you don't have total control over anything. The funny thing is that those who have been playing this game for years don't see this as if it didn't exist and only have eyes to complain about missed passes from 5 meters, balls hitting the post, etc.

First of all, you don't fully understand the stats, playstyle, and skills. 
You need to grasp those things first. 

Why do you use Puskás, who has no stamina, for 90 minutes? 😟
You don't understand that his stats decrease when his stamina decreases.

Next, your shooting is not good. 
Shoot with accurate control. 
Get past the opposing defender in the penalty area and shoot calmly.

Third, use super cancels more. 
I previously taught you to learn "Tess-cancel," but I can see you find it difficult and deliberately avoid it.🤭
 Don't push yourself too hard, "The noob Nick." 

However, make more use of super cancels and kick fakes. 
You used them twice in this video and created some good scenes. 👏👏

Super Cancels correct a player's posture. 
In this game, a player's posture is crucial when passing or shooting. 
Having the correct posture increases the success rate. 
Try to use Super Cancels more often.

Did you notice? 
When you do a shot fake, the opposing defender's AI will fall for it. 🤩
This is when you can dribble past the defender and take a shot. 
You should also learn “the shot-cancel-dash”. 
The shot cancel dash is a technique that allows you to accelerate and prevent the opposing defender from catching up to you. 
There's still more to say, but let's leave it at that for today.
Good luck 🤞

author: @cambot900
comment_text: 19:25 respectfully trying to tell the devs on the reddit whats wrong with the game is like speaking to a brick wall. people would make posts with the same gripes and a dev would comment something along the lines of "we're looking into it" for entire half year i played and paid attention to the game. when i saw that cookie cutter response for the 50th time i replied "me when i lie" and they banned me lmao. meanwhile i had made a post laying out detailed things wrong with the game, and potential avenues to mediate them, which that dev never responded to but would respond to peoples childish complaint posts(myself included). Made me stop playing the game. Will be interested to see content from you when you play real people. Hopefully long shot trait is nerfed, wingers dont just run to the corner, and goalies dont become peak when you try to score on a move in the box

author: @eldararnautovic2797
comment_text:
Honestly everything looked phenomenal, until Nick started the match... I genuinely wanted to download the game right now, but gameplay looks just dead. Players feel robotic and everything moves way too fast. Doing what EA does with gameplay will just make UFL their cheap clone. I mean just look at PES and now eFootball, everything outside of gameplay is bad or at best just fine, but gameplay is so good that we are willing to forget and live with all bad things.

But UFL does have huge potential, and now it's only up to them to make great game that will be real competition to EA and eFootball.

author: @elitristan3601
comment_text: I have to say, I really like the player and goalkeeper animations. I’ve never seen a goalkeeper in FIFA or eFootball who just stays put on that shot—not even jumping—and just raises his hand. That’s realistic. Also, the way he blocks the low shot and just holds onto the ball. The ball physics look good. The game has potential. It would be a real boss move if they added something like PES’s Master League as a mode. Many offline players from PES and eFootball would switch over to UFL.
